# shouldFetchSubresources

**Instance Property**

A Boolean value indicating whether to download subresources specified by the metadata.

## Declaration

```swift
var shouldFetchSubresources: Bool { get set }
```

## Discussion

Subresources include the icon, image, or video. When set to `false`, the returned [doc://com.apple.Link-Presentation/documentation/LinkPresentation/LPLinkMetadata] object consists only of metadata retrieved from the main resource identified by the url passed to [doc://com.apple.Link-Presentation/documentation/LinkPresentation/LPMetadataProvider/startFetchingMetadata(for:completionHandler:)-54z5i].

The default value is `true`.

## Fetching metadata

- **startFetchingMetadata(for:completionHandler:)**: Fetches metadata for the given URL.
- **cancel()**: Cancels a metadata request.
- **timeout**: The time interval after which the request automatically fails if it hasn’t already completed.
